idea-plugin.name: flexoki
idea-plugin.description:
Flexoki is an inky color scheme for prose and code, designed for reading and writing on digital screens and inspired by analog inks and warm shades of paper. Created by Steph Ango (MIT licensed).

This plugin bundles both Flexoki Light and Flexoki Dark as full IDE themes, each with a matching editor color scheme that covers syntax highlighting and the run/terminal ANSI palette.

  • Exact Flexoki palette — light uses the 600 weights, dark uses the 400 weights.
  • Editor, gutter, caret row, selection, and console colors all themed.
  • Pairs with Sync with OS for automatic light/dark switching.

Adaptive setup: open Settings | Appearance & Behavior | Appearance, enable Sync with OS, then map Light → Flexoki Light and Dark → Flexoki Dark.

Source code & issues: github.com/yhxlele/flexoki-jetbrains

Flexoki color palette © Steph Ango, MIT License.
idea-plugin.change-notes: • 1.0.0 — Initial release: Flexoki Light and Flexoki Dark themes with matching editor color schemes (syntax + console ANSI palette).
